plan.original_text: What is the consensus EPS estimate revision trend for ACMR over the last three months?
plan.thesis: ACMR is demonstrating operating leverage, with revenue up 20.77% and gross profit up 50.06%. If semiconductor equipment demand remains stable in China, margin expansion could drive EPS acceleration over the next 2–4 quarters. The thesis fails if capex orders slow.

steps.description: ACMR consensus EPS estimate history over the last 3 months — estimates.eps.history

ambiguity_notes.consensus EPS estimate revision trend: grounded to the trend of estimates.eps.history over the last 3 months

plan.reasoning: To determine the EPS estimate revision trend, we fetch the timeseries of consensus EPS estimates for ACMR over the past three months and compute its trend. A positive trend indicates upward revisions, supporting the thesis of EPS acceleration.
